claims.claim: The research question addressed here is: *Can clause-aware citation span extraction, tuned on perturbed synthetic citation cases, improve held-out exact span recovery and character-level F1 versus a sentence-level baseline?* This work is scoped to a controlled, locally reproducible benchmark.

claims.claim: The baseline assigns each citation marker to the full sentence in which it appears, using standard sentence-boundary detection (period, question mark, exclamation mark followed by whitespace and an uppercase letter).
